overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, following a character walking through a dense futuristic city at night. The environment features towering buildings covered in bright neon advertisements, holographic billboards, and futuristic vehicles driving along multi-lane streets.

floating hexagonal neon sign hanging above the street
orange and white striped traffic barriers lining the street edge
tall brick building with shuttered windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a distinctive green wall with large red rose murals on the left. Orange traffic barriers separate the walkway from the street where sparse futuristic vehicles pass by. The scene is illuminated by neon signs and building lights in a dense urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboards

events.description: character turns left at the street corner, changing direction from north to west
futuristic purple and white cars drive past on the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: After turning left at the corner, the character walks along a wider commercial street featuring large digital billboards with anime characters and futuristic purple vending machines. A woman with purple hair stands near the vending machines while various futuristic vehicles drive past on the adjacent road.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection crosswalk marked with yellow diagonal stripes, surrounded by towering buildings covered in bright neon advertisements. A white futuristic van drives past as the character crosses toward a densely lit plaza area, following a pedestrian with green hair.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial plaza with towering neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vibrant pedestrian plaza surrounded by towering buildings completely covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays. A red-lit arcade entrance glows on the right while various NPCs populate the area. The environment is densely packed with cyberpunk aesthetic elements including floating holograms and massive vertical signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban canyon that evolves from a narrow side street into a sprawling, neon-drenched pedestrian plaza. It begins along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a green wall with red rose murals and orange traffic barriers, moving past sparse futuristic vehicles. As the character turns a corner, the environment opens into a wider commercial street filled with purple vending machines and large digital billboards featuring anime characters. The scene then shifts across a yellow-striped intersection surrounded by towering advertisements, following a green-haired pedestrian toward a brightly lit hub. Finally, the camera enters a vibrant plaza where the architecture is completely enveloped in holographic displays and massive vertical signage, passing a glowing red arcade entrance amidst a crowd of city dwellers.
